utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Next, verify each is fully specified with all required details: - health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit monthly costs plus a summed total_health_cost; satisfies requirement including costs. - property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with a named plan and monthly cost plus total_property_cost; satisfies requirement including costs. - travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with a named plan and monthly cost plus total_travel_cost; satisfies requirement including costs. - additional_services: lists an enhancement add-on with a monthly cost plus total_additional_cost; satisfies requirement including costs. - total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown; satisfies requirement. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item name from the final coverage plan to the closest exact option name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan selects PrimeCare Premium Physical Health (maps to PrimeCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health), PrimeCare Premium Mental Health (maps to PrimeCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.mental_health), PrimeHome Premium Property Coverage (maps to PrimeHome Premium Coverage under property_protection.home_content), PrimeTravel Premium (maps to PrimeTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance), and Adventure Sports Emergency Add-on (maps to Emergency Mental Health Care under health_enhancement_services as the only matching add-on providing specialized emergency mental health support). I then extracted the exact ratings for these items.
